THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARK, JIN LORI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 150-A 5TH AVE. SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $5,120.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $239.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,359.00, LEASE FORFEITED, U.D. DAMAGES OF $16.66 PER DAY COMMENCING 4/18/00 AND CONTINUING AT THAT RATE UNTIL POSSESSION IS RESTORED TO THE PLAINTIFF. PLUS REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES.
